diary_entries.entry: Population: 29. A massive dust storm engulfs the colony. I spent the year on terraforming. Closest to Orion-12.
The dust_storm changed everything. I feel worried about our future here.
The dust_storm changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.

meta_awareness: Ares (year 65): 'The sub-simulations we run to model our governance... what if we are someone else's sub-simulation? What if our decisions are being evaluated from outside?'
